headline: Jupiter Perpetuals protocol partially documented; JLP token identified but core perpetuals program ID not published in official sources
short_headline: JLP token found; perpetuals program ID not discoverable

findings.text: Solana block explorers require JavaScript rendering; unable to fetch name-tag search pages via plain HTTP. Attempted fetch of explorer.solana.com returned JavaScript-only page.
No canonical deployments page found in https://docs.jup.ag or https://dev.jup.ag. Documentation provides product descriptions but no deployed address registry.
No audits recorded in protocol.audit_links (null); unable to extract scope addresses from audit PDFs.
protocol.github is null; cannot walk source repos for Foundry broadcast or hardhat-deploy artifacts.
Single chain (Solana) pinned; D1-D4 blockers prevent enumeration.
Cannot enumerate factory children; perpetuals program ID not published in official sources.

JLP token address 27G8MtK7VtTcCHkpASjSDdkWWYfoqT6ggEuKidVJidD4 traced to Solflare and multiple third-party sources; included in admin_addresses despite lack of direct official confirmation in fetched documentation.

rationale.verdict: Cannot complete discovery for Jupiter Perpetuals due to inaccessible block-explorer pages (JavaScript-gated), missing official deployments registry, null GitHub and audit_links, and unpublished perpetuals program ID in official documentation. JLP token address is traceable but core perpetuals program remains undiscovered. Classified as off-chain-only because official docs were fetched but did not contain deployment details.

evidence.shows: Official Jupiter documentation homepage; no deployed addresses or program IDs listed
Jupiter developer platform homepage; no program IDs or deployment information visible
Jupiter GitHub organization with 178 public repositories; no perpetuals program or IDL repo found in overview or repository list
JLP token and pool composition (SOL, ETH, WBTC, USDC, USDT) explained; oracle details provided; no program ID listed
Solflare wallet lists JLP (Jupiter Perps) token with official Solana contract address 27G8MtK7VtTcCHkpASjSDdkWWYfoqT6ggEuKidVJidD4
Third-party review confirms Jupiter Perps operates LP-based model with JLP token and multi-asset pool; no program ID provided

unknowns: D1: Solana block explorer name-tag search blocked by JavaScript rendering requirement; cannot fetch https://explorer.solana.com/address/{address} or search results
D2: Official deployments/addresses documentation page not found in docs.jup.ag or dev.jup.ag; may exist at alternative URL not discoverable via search
D3: No audits in protocol.audit_links; cannot extract addresses from audit PDFs
D4: protocol.github=null; cannot enumerate deployment artifacts from source repos (Foundry broadcast, hardhat-deploy, manual indexes)
D6: Jupiter Perpetuals core program ID not published in fetched official documentation; third-party SDK references suggest a program exists but address is not authoritative
D8: JLP token address discoverable but lacks direct citation from official Jupiter-published source in this run

protocol_metadata.about: Jupiter Perpetuals is a decentralized perpetual futures exchange on Solana offering up to 100x leverage. Traders open long or short positions by depositing collateral (USDC, USDT, or SOL) and borrowing from the JLP (Jupiter Liquidity Provider) pool, which holds SOL, ETH, wBTC, USDC, and USDT. The platform charges borrow fees rather than funding rates, uses oracle pricing to eliminate price impact, and automates liquidations to protect pool solvency.
